headlines.description: — Braxton Ashcraft won his fourth consecutive start and the Pittsburgh Pirates defeated the Washington Nationals 7-1 on Saturday.

events.name: Minnesota Twins at New York Yankees

highlights.headline: Twins crank 6 home runs in win over Yankees
highlights.description: Twins crank 6 home runs in win over Yankees

tracking.trackingName: COM_MLB Highlight (Twins crank 6 home runs in win over Yankees) 2026/07/04 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Josh Bell homered in consecutive at-bats and the Minnesota Twins hit six homers in a game for the first time in nearly three years to pull away for an 11-4 victory over the slumping New York Yankees on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Josh Bell homers twice as Twins go deep six times in 11-4 victory over Yankees

video.headline: Twins crank 6 home runs in win over Yankees

tracking.trackingName: COM_MLB Highlight (Twins crank 6 home runs in win over Yankees) 2026/07/04 ESHEET
COM_MLB Highlight (Tigers shutout the Rangers 3-0) 2026/07/04 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Riley Greene hit a two-run homer in the first inning, Jack Flaherty pitched three-hit ball over 5 2/3 innings and the Detroit Tigers beat the Texas Rangers 3-0 on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Greene homers in 1st inning and trio of Tigers pitchers combine on 3-hit shutout win over Rangers

tracking.trackingName: COM_MLB Highlight (Tigers shutout the Rangers 3-0) 2026/07/04 ESHEET

events.name: Toronto Blue Jays at Seattle Mariners

tracking.trackingName: COM_MLB Highlight (Mariners crush Rangers 11-0) 2026/07/04 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Logan Gilbert gave up one hit and struck out seven in 7 1/3 innings, Randy Arozarena hit a grand slam, and the Seattle Mariners beat the Toronto Blue Jays 11-0 on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Mariners rout Blue Jays 11-0 as Logan Gilbert allows 1 hit over 7 1/3 innings

tracking.trackingName: COM_MLB Highlight (Mariners crush Rangers 11-0) 2026/07/04 ESHEET
